user.title: GeoSphere Austria Next
user.description: Point forecast (AROME) and current conditions (INCA nowcast) from the official GeoSphere Austria Dataset API for any location — no weather station required.

data_description.location: Any point inside the AROME model domain (Austria and surrounding Alpine region). Current-condition data is available inside Austria only.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the GeoSphere API
error.out_of_domain: This location is outside the GeoSphere AROME model domain

data_description.current_interval: How often the nowcast is polled. The AROME model itself only updates every 3 hours.
data_description.forecast_interval: How often the AROME forecast is polled.
data_description.air_quality: Adds NO₂, O₃, PM10, PM2.5 and a daily European Air Quality Index from GeoSphere's WRF-Chem forecast (about 2 extra API requests per hour).
